===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Arena
Oberhausen, Germany
27 April 2002

No info about lineage and taper.excellent sound.


Disc 1
intro 
Humming Bird
You're A Big Girl Now
Desolation Row
Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
 Watching The River Flow
Positively 4th Street
Cry A While
Subterranean Homesick Blues
Tomorrow Is A Long Time
Masters Of War
Tangled Up In Blue


Disc 2
Summer Days
Every Grain Of Sand
Drifter's Escape
Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat
Things Have Changed Like A Rolling Stone
If Dogs Run Free
Honest With Me
Blowin' In The Wind 




Concert # 1418 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 17 of the 2002 Europe Spring Tour. 2002 concert # 35.

Concert # 4 with the 14th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Jim Keltner (drums & percussion).

 
1–4, 9-11, 18, 20 acoustic with the band.
2, 4, 9, 13, 14, 18, 20 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2 Larry Campbell (cittern).
1, 20 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

Note. First acoustic version of You're A Big Girl Now!
13 new songs (65%) compared to previous concert. 2 new songs for this tou
